title: Fix Wall Pop branding, improve text readability, and audit functionality

requirements.text: Update all references from 'Wallop' to 'Wall Pop' throughout the application, including the Header component logo text, page title in index.html, manifest.json app name and short_name, and any other branding references

quotes: First of all, it's called wall pop not wallop

acceptanceCriteria: All visible branding displays 'Wall Pop' instead of 'Wallop'
PWA manifest displays 'Wall Pop' as the app name

requirements.text: Improve text readability across the application by adding semi-transparent dark backgrounds behind all text content, especially on pages using the skull-flames background image. Ensure text has sufficient contrast (WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1) against backgrounds

quotes: it's hard to read so make the letters that I'm supposed to be reading on the actual website where I can see them or put some kind of background behind it where you can see what you're doing

acceptanceCriteria: All text content has a semi-transparent background overlay for improved contrast
Text is clearly readable against the skull-flames background
Text contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text)

requirements.text: Conduct a comprehensive audit of all application functionality to identify and fix any non-working features. Test image generation (text-to-image and image-to-image), image gallery display, download functionality, delete operations, profile setup, authentication flow, and admin panel access

quotes: this shit doesn't work. You need to go through everything fine, make sure it all works exactly the way it's supposed to

acceptanceCriteria: Image generation successfully creates and displays images
Gallery displays all published images correctly
Download functionality works for all images
Delete operations remove images as expected
Authentication and profile setup flow completes without errors
Admin panel displays correct statistics and is accessible only to admins
All interactive elements respond appropriately to user actions

requirements.text: Provide the complete project as a downloadable package that includes all source files, configuration, and assets in a single organized folder structure that can be easily copied, shared, or deployed

quotes: give me one folder of all this put together where I can copy and paste it or take it wherever I want to share a zip file whatever

acceptanceCriteria: Complete project structure is available as a downloadable archive
All source files, assets, and configuration files are included
Folder structure is organized and ready for deployment
Archive can be extracted and used independently

constraints: Maintain the existing black/white minimalist design theme
Keep all authentication through Internet Identity
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (hooks/useInternetIdentity, hooks/useActor, main.tsx, components/ui)
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall visual theme or color scheme
Adding new features beyond fixing existing functionality
Changing the backend data model or API structure
